description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural wood grain finish. The front features three open shelves, each with a deep cavity suitable for storing books, tools, or other items. The sides and back are solid panels, giving the structure a sturdy and enclosed appearance. The top surface is flat and can be used as an additional support area for objects. There are no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The overall construction suggests it is intended for practical storage in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces.
description: A rectangular wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a flat top, finished in natural wood grain. Minimalist and functional, with solid sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and a flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood back panel, fully enclosed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel.
